text.title: Tool Consolidation Decision Rule Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md Applies-If conditions all hold AND no Skip-If condition fires?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — route to the correct methodology

branch.question: Are every prerequisite input typed AND cited with source_path_or_url?

conclusion.verdict: reject input; require typed + sourced values before continuing

branch.question: Do all HIGH-severity rules from 01-core-rules.xml pass against the inputs?

conclusion.verdict: surface the gap; do not synthesize an output until the failing rule is resolved
produce the artefact via templates/tool-consolidation-decision-rule.* then run scripts/validate-tool-consolidation-decision-rule.py

text.example: preconditions=true → inputs_typed=true → rules_pass=true → produce artefact and register.
